_comment: This controls the big HERO section at the very top of the site. Edit the text values below — never touch index.html.
_comment_title:
titleLine1 is the plain-white part, titleHighlight is the glowing green part.
already breaks the line, don't add another.
subtitle: I design high-CTR YouTube thumbnails for After Effects tutorials, presets, giveaways, project files and editing creators.
_comment_buttons: You can add, remove or reorder buttons here. style must be one of: primary, ghost, outline.
